# Experiment Catalog

## artifacts.py

**Description:** Artifact CRUD with full validation pipeline: domain type check, required property validation, JSONL event write, then Neo4j write.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## build.py

**Description:** Paper build pipeline: discovers section .md files, resolves graph reference tokens (result/figure/cite), runs Tier 1 structural checks (SI-01 missing, SI-02 stale, SI-03 proposed, SI-07 missing bibtex, SI-08 missing figure), runs Tier 2/3 QC, assembles .qmd, optionally renders via Quarto.

**Parameters:** --skip-qc, --strict, --output PATH, --no-render, --qc-config, --style-config

**Results:** *none linked*

## cli.py

**Description:** CLI entry point. Defines the main Click group and registers all command subgroups (artifact, link, result, task, briefing, closeout, paper, docs).

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## config.py

**Description:** Project config management: loads seldon.yaml and .env, creates Neo4j driver, manages session lifecycle (start/end/get current session).

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## events.py

**Description:** Append-only JSONL event store. Source of truth for all state changes in a Seldon project.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## graph.py

**Description:** Neo4j graph operations: CRUD for artifact nodes, relationships, provenance traversal, and stats queries.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## loader.py

**Description:** Domain configuration parser. Loads research.yaml and validates it into Pydantic models (DomainConfig, ArtifactTypeConfig, PropertyDef, RelationshipConfig). Provides type/relationship/property validation helpers.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## qc.py

**Description:** Paper prose quality checks (Tier 2: sentence length, paragraph length, bold, em-dashes, semicolons, hedge stacking, ambiguous pronouns) and style checks (Tier 3: banned words/phrases, repetition, clichés, self-congratulation, nominalizations).

**Parameters:** --tier 2|3 to run subset; configs loaded from paper/ or template defaults

**Results:** *none linked*

## staleness.py

**Description:** Staleness propagation: when a Result goes stale, cascades to all downstream artifacts that CITES it via the graph.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## state.py

**Description:** State machine validation. Checks that a proposed state transition is permitted by the domain config before any write occurs.

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*

## sync.py

**Description:** JSONL-to-Neo4j sync engine. Replays events from the append-only log into the Neo4j projection. Supports full replay (destructive) and incremental sync (from sync point).

**Parameters:** N/A — library module, imported not run directly

**Results:** *none linked*
